title: Rustins Advanced Wood Preserver Clear 1L
features: Non-flammable product based on micro-emulsion nanotechnology
Quick drying and can be applied to wet or dry timbers
description: From the manufacturer About Us Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture with 50 pounds. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the good brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. Rustins Advanced Wood Preserver Clear 1L Advanced Wood Preserver is a low odour, non-flammable product based on micro emulsion nanotechnology. The ultra-fine particle size allows deep penetration of the preserver to take place so the performance of the product is much good than standard wood preservation products. It is quick drying and can be applied to wet or dry timbers. For use against wood rotting fungi within domestic, commercial, institutional and industrial premises.

specifications_table.Coverage: ‎covers a certain square footage of outdoor wood surfaces
